name: vibe-coding-product-launcher
description: Use when a user wants to build or launch a product from a vague idea, especially when they say "I want to build...", "Help me make...", "我想做一个...", "帮我做一个...", or ask to start vibe coding. Ask product questions, never technical ones, then output ready-to-use project-doc.md and dev-guide.md.
author: Raingle
